docs.name: Confetti Burst
docs.description: Click-triggered confetti particle explosion with customizable colors and physics.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element wrapped by the particle generation effect zone.

props.name: className
props.description: Styling configurations for the interaction wrapper logic container.

props.name: particleCount
props.description: Quantity multiplier defining how many fragments evaluate per execution.

props.name: colors
props.description: Array defining hex code palettes defining sequential particle rendering.

props.name: spread
props.description: Radiant measurement indicating geometric angle variance for throwing trajectories.

props.name: duration
props.description: Timer limit capping maximum gravity simulation lifetime.

docs.overview: ConfettiBurst fires a particle explosion from a point on screen — perfect for celebrating milestones like a completed form, a successful payment, or an unlocked achievement.

scenarios.title: Success after form submission
scenarios.description: Trigger a confetti burst when the user completes a sign-up or checkout form.

scenarios.title: Achievement unlock
scenarios.description: Celebrate when a user reaches a milestone inside a dashboard or onboarding flow.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Visual-only celebration effect; should be paired with text feedback for assistive tech.
